title: Talking about last weekend
subtitle: Build a small past-tense answer.
duolingoBridge: A2 speaking often starts with “What did you do last weekend?”
overview: Knowledge point 1: use sequence words with passé composé.
Knowledge point 2: add one feeling or opinion at the end.

items.fr: Le week-end dernier, je suis allé au marché.
items.en: Last weekend, I went to the market.
items.es: El fin de semana pasado fui al mercado.

items.fr: Samedi matin, j’ai acheté du pain.
items.es: El sábado por la mañana compré pan.

items.fr: Ensuite, j’ai bu un café avec mon ami.
items.en: After that, I had a coffee with my friend.
items.es: Después tomé un café con mi amigo.

items.fr: Dimanche, je suis resté à la maison.
items.es: El domingo me quedé en casa.

items.en: It was simple, but very pleasant.
